name: decantr
description: Design intelligence layer for AI-generated web applications

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @decantr/essence-spec --filter @decantr/registry --filter @decantr/css run build && pnpm --filter @decantr/core --filter @decantr/mcp-server --filter @decantr/cli --filter @decantr/vite-plugin run build
scripts.showcase: pnpm run showcase:build && pnpm run showcase:copy
